results.title: Periodic functions
results.creator_credit: United States. Dept. of the Navy
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Radio Technician Training”.
Defines periodic function; illustrates the graphing of sine angles; and relates sine waves to the amount of voltage produced by generators.

results.title: Oscillators
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Radio Technician Training”.
Explains the basic principles of electronic oscillation and variations in oscillations are studied; functioning of a common circuit and tank circuit are explained by means of animation.

results.title: Current and electromotive force
results.creator_credit: United States. Dept. of the Navy
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Radio Technician Training”.
Explains the electron theory, discussing arrangement of molecules, building up of current conductors, electromotive force, resistance and chemical and mechanical sources of electromotive force.

results.title: Audio oscillator operation
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Radio Technician Training”.
Explains the operation and use of audio oscillators and shows how to check an amplifier with the audio oscillator and “A” scope. No other credits.

results.title: War on warrens
results.creator_credit: Roy Violer, Department of Agriculture and Tasmanian Government Film Unit
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Rabbit Control”.
Sound advice on rabbit control, ie control of blackberry and gorse which provides ground cover for rabbits. Also use of chemicals and sealing warrens that can’t be destroyed by ploughing.
